name: JWT

unions.name: DecodeError
unions.comment: A structured error describing exactly how the decoder failed.

unions.name: JWT
unions.comment:
A JSON Web Token.

Can be either a JWS (signed) or a JWE (encrypted). The latter is not yet implemented.

unions.name: TimeConstraintError
unions.comment: Error specific to time constraints in the claimset

unions.name: VerificationError
unions.comment: A structured error describing all verification errors.

values.name: fromString
values.comment:
Decode a JWT from string.

    fromString "eyJhbGciOi..." == Ok ...
    fromString "" == Err ...
    fromString "definitelyNotAJWT" == Err ...

values.name: getTimeConstraintError
values.comment: Check if a verification error relates to the time constraints in the claimset.

values.name: isValid
values.comment: Check if the token is valid.
values.type: JWT.ClaimSet.VerifyOptions -> String.String -> Time.Posix -> JWT.JWT -> Result.Result JWT.VerificationError Basics.Bool

values.name: validate
values.comment: A task to check if the token is valid.
values.type: JWT.ClaimSet.VerifyOptions -> String.String -> JWT.JWT -> Task.Task Basics.Never (Result.Result JWT.VerificationError Basics.Bool)
